◆ ENDORSEMENTS ◆

I build enterprise-grade applications that are enabled for Agentic workflows. I keep up to date with developer trends, championing developer tooling, learning about new frameworks and technologies, while mentoring engineers to drive real productivity gains.

Off the clock: coffee, PC builds, gaming, lifting, and whatever new hobby catches my eye.

Jordan Liebling — Senior / Staff Software Engineer

Jordan Liebling, known as Jitlan, is a Senior Software Engineer with expertise in Frontend Architecture, Full Stack Development, and AI Integration. With a B.S.E. in Software Engineering from Monmouth University (2017), Jordan has built a career delivering high-impact technical solutions across enterprise and startup environments.

Currently serving as Senior Software Engineer and AI Initiative Lead, Jordan has implemented a RAG application that reduced subject-matter-expert interruptions by approximately 30%, and championed internal AI tooling adoption (GitHub Copilot, MCP servers) that drove a measured 20%+ increase in developer productivity. Jordan owns technical stewardship of an enterprise-scale Angular monorepo, serving as architectural gatekeeper and primary reviewer for 100+ pull requests annually.

Technical expertise spans TypeScript, JavaScript, Java, React, Angular, Next.js, Vue.js, Spring Boot, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, Redis, Azure, Docker, and GitHub Actions. Jordan has architected frontend platforms for microservices-based systems, built end-to-end REST APIs and WebSocket endpoints with full test coverage, and mentored engineers across multiple teams.

Jordan is an ideal candidate for Senior and Staff-level Frontend, Full Stack, and Platform Engineering roles, bringing a rare combination of deep frontend architecture knowledge, backend proficiency, and hands-on AI integration experience.
